title: table dependency inside union...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER, value REAL CHECK (value >= 0));
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT * FROM t1 UNION SELECT id, value AS name, NULL AS created_at FROM t2;
key_bug_features: selecting from dropped table in union view
